title: Bumble Inc (BMBL) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Initiatives and Financial Performance
text: Bumble Inc (BMBL) Q3 2024 Earnings Highlights. Financial Performance: Total revenue reached $274 million, declining 1% year-over-year despite unfavorable foreign exchange impacts of roughly $1 million. Total paying users expanded 11% to 4.3 million users. Average revenue per paying user (ARPPU) decreased 10% to $21.17. Profitability: GAAP net loss of $849 million, primarily driven by a noncash impairment charge of $892 million related to intangible assets and goodwill. Adjusted EBITDA increased 10% to $83 million with a 30% margin, representing a 290 basis point improvement year-over-year. Free cash flow generation of $92 million during the quarter. Capital Position: Cash reserves of $252 million at quarter-end. Repurchased $90 million in stock during Q3. Total shareholder returns of $361 million since the buyback program's inception. App-Specific Results: Bumble App Revenue $220 million (down 1%), Paying users 2.9 million (up 10%). Badoo and Other Revenue $53 million (down 1%), Paying users 1.4 million (up 14%). Forward Guidance: Full-year 2024 $1.066-$1.072 billion (1.6% growth at midpoint). Q4 2024 $256-$262 million (5% decline at midpoint).
